feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Stock on Hand using 2LIS_03_BF
entry.content:
Hi There,

I have a requirement to calculate the following , stock on hand for a given day using a SQL given we have the following extractors enabled  2LIS_03_BF (MSEG) & 2LIS_03_UM

  • Inventory QTY
  • Inventory unit cost
  • Inventory Value
  • In network in transit Qty
  • In network in transit Value

Any suggestions or  any help would be much appreciated.  The client does not want to use MATDOC and MATDOC_EXTRACT for their reporting but would like to use the above two extractors.

 

Thanks

Nick

entry.title: main item & free goods item
entry.content:
if we create Free Goods Condition with main item 5 piece and one piece as free item. then, in delivery we modify main item to 4 pieces, then we note that the 1 Piece of free goods complete to the issue and billing.

we need to issue and billing with the delivery qty.

entry.title: Planning of materials provided to Subcon Vendor at MRP Area level
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have a requriement, the planning of components that are provided to a subcontracting Vendor should be planned seperately at different MRP area level. Detailed explanation is as follows,

  1. A finished material (FG123) has a BOM component (SFG123) that undergoes material subcontracting process.
  2. The Finished material (FG123) is produced in two differnent MRP Area (1234_A &1234_B) which is of type 02 (Storage Location MRP Area).
  3. The Dependent Requirement of SFG123 will also be generated at each MRP area seperately.
  4. Post MRP Run, the Subcon PR for SFG123 will be generated at each MRP Area.
  5. The Subcontractor requirements of the Material provided (SubReq) of the components that are provided to the vendor is only generated at plant level and not at each MRP Area level, hence the procurement will also be done only at plant level.

The business requriement is to generate the SubReq seperately at each MRP Area level and the subsequent procurement proposal for RM123 to be generated at S.Loc MRP Area seperately and not at the Plant MRP Area level.

Pls let me know if it is possible to create SubReq and PR at MRP Area for RM123.

 

Thanks in Advance.

entry.title: Custom report
entry.content:
Can we create custom report via Developer Extensibility/BTP as we create in key user extensibility.

And also want to know can we download custom report as csv file via Developer Extensibility/BTP?

If yes, could you please provide me reference link/blog?

Best Regards,

KhaingZin

entry.title: PR/PO Flexible Workflow with role Assignment
entry.content:
Dear SAP Expert,

I have a requirement to add user's manager to the approval workflow without using the HR module (it's not included in the project).

I tried to handle the requirement using SAP Flexible workflow for PR/PO and i didn't understand how to link the role to the user manager (i'm on the Manage workflow for Purchase requisitions app)

Client doesn't have HR module activated. Do i need to have HR module activated or is there any other standard solution ?

entry.title: Agreement Number VBAK-KNUMA is not updated using ORDERS IDOC
entry.content:
Hello SAP experts,

     I need to update the field VBAK-KNUMA (Agreement number) using an ORDERS IDOC. However, this field is not available for update online using VA01 but IDOC documentation says that it can be updated using segment E1EDK02 segment with qualifier 072 and the agreement no text in E1EDK02-BELNR field. I did that and the sales order was successfully created from the IDOC, however the field VBAK-KNUMA was not updated. 

    Is this because the field VBAK-KNUMA is not available online for updates and hence the function module 'IDOC_INPUT_ORDERS' which is called during processing of the IDOC, doesn't update the fields which are not available for online VA01 update.

Please let me know your opinion on this.

Regards

Anustup Chakrabarti

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA S4CORE107 error: No valid Business Transaction Category: IBIP
entry.content: While executing EOD IHB job (G/L transfer) in tcode sa38: /PF1/R_IHB_GL_TRANSFER, i have the following error: No valid Business Transaction Category: IBIP. I can see from the note 3269873 - Message FINS_ACDOC_CUST602 ("No valid Business Transaction Category: &1.") when creating a cost accounting transaction - SAP for Me, that IBIP corresponds to the central incoming payment scenario, which is correct in our case. How can we fix this error?  System says that this note can not be implemented. Thanks a lot

entry.title: US Garnishment
entry.content: Previouly we were using the RFFOUS_T program and Function Module 'HRPAYUS_REMIT_INFO_CREATE_LIST' to access our Payroll system and to update the payment files we send to the bank with employee information from HR System. This was in our ECC system but now we have moved to PERSON_NAME and we're using program SAPFPAYM for which we required the same behavior.

entry.title: How to make sales order mandatory for a production order type?
External settlements missing in PS hierarchy reports for internal orders related to WBS-Elements
entry.content:
While running a standard PS hierarchy report e.g. S_ALR_87013531, external settlement postings for internal orders are not shown. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Is it possible to automatically print an Object Link Document upon release of a production order
entry.content:
We have an external application running a production spec and document system that uses Supabase that is unsupportable and no longer works with our version of SAP after our migration away from ECC to S4 Hana Public Cloud

To replace this system I am looking to introduce the document management to store and publish production specs. I have created some object links to materials and added them to the BOMs

Is there a way to have copies of these specs print out automatically with production paperwork and picklist upon production order release?

entry.title: missing icon in VA05
entry.content:
Hi.

I have problem with missing icon in VA05.

"Display Variants" is not visible on production but available on test system.

The functionality is there (i can click the empty space on toolbar or use shortcut).

The same problem for all visual themes..

Parametr SD_VARIANT_MAINTAIN -> OK.

Regards,

Piotr

entry.title: How to calculate open quantity per schedule line in scheduling agreement in new report?
entry.content:
Hej!

Our developer is trying to find a way to calculate the open qty of a schedule line but seems not able to find any way to do it easily. Seems run-time calculation in VA32 is really complex. Does anyone know a good way to achieve this without copying all the std code from the transaction?

Thanks and regards,

Magnus Frankell

entry.title: Variant Configuration - Object Dependencies - CEIL Function not Working
entry.content:
We are working on an Object Dependency with a VC BOM where we need the final result to round up to the nearest integer.  We see that the CEIL function should do exactly that but it is not working.  Our formula is as follows: 

$self.TC_BOM_QTY = CEIL ( MDATA $self.TC_BOM_QTY / TC_PC_PER_BOARD )

 We want to be the BOM Quantity to be equal to the BOM Quantity divided by the number of Pieces per Board.

For example: 

TC_BOM_QTY = 45

TC_PC_PER_BOARD = 18

45 / 18 = 2.5

We are expecting the CEIL function to set TC_BOM_QTY result to 3, but we are constantly receiving 2.5.  

We have even tried the FLOOR function to see if its just with CEIL, but we still get 2.5.  

Is there an issue with our Formula or Variables?   Do they need to be of a certain type for those functions (CEIL, FLOOR) to work?

entry.title: Is there any security risk when running scripting with an older SAP GUI version?
entry.content:
Good day.

Is there any security risk  when running scripting with an older SAP GUI version? Is there a way to enforce minimum GUI version otherwise users will not be able to run scripts?

Kind regards


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: MTO Production order execution, with variable GR qty for sales order with lot charge
entry.content:
The business process is transforming customer supplied semiconductor wafers into individual shipping components.

Key elements:

  1. Sales orders are billed as a lot charge, with a sales order unit of one. (It is this way due the customer requirements and purchase order)
    1. Regardless of the resulting good parts, the customer pays for processing all of them.
  2. The associated MTO production order needs to be quantity of one, as the stock quantity needs to match the sales order qty.
  3. However, the lower-level production orders, have quantities greater than one, as all the stock is at the individual component level. (this is typical with wafers, as each wafer has a known variable good qty)
    1. As a result, we have to “write off” 201 the excess stock and only post quantity of one to the MTO production order.

The ask: does SAP provide any functionality to manage this type of business process, without a bunch of transactional work arounds?

entry.title: SAP S/4 HANA - EHS Data Collection in Compliance Scenario
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

In EHS compliance scenario, I want to collect data weekly.
I added data collection activity but the options provided for data period do not let me collect weekly.
Then, How should I collect data once a week ?
I would be thankful if you let me know whether there is any solution for weekly data collection .

Sincerely,
Fatemeh

entry.title: Custom Analytical Queries / CDS - Deriviation Functions
entry.content:
Hi,

im trying to understand the concept of deriviation functions in the context of custom analytical queries and cds views. 

My Goal is to understand and create deriviation functions for specific analytical query fields

As shown below, i want to create a simple Derviation Function for the field DeriviationPlaneType

I proceeded as follows (i tried to use the deriviation for CostCenter (ZF_MYCOSTCENTER) as an template):
1. My Base CDS Entity

2. My Deriviation CDS-Entity, my goal is to only have planetypes with the value '747-400'

This CDS-Entity is released (C1)

3. My Primary Data Source, as far as i understand, i need to associate the cds-entity which contains the field with the deriviation function (ZI_PLANETYPE -> ZF_MYPLANETYPE-> DeriviationPlaneType)

4. Custom CDS-View

5. Custom Analytical Query

I've created a custom analytical query based on the beforementioned custom cds-view.

But my Deriviation Function is not showing up

Did i miss anything?

I also tried to just copy F_MYCOSTCENTER

and creating a simple Cube

But i am getting an error message when using this cube in a custom analytica query when selecting my deriviation function.

I hope anyone can help me to fix this and to get an better understanding how deriviation function work.

best regards

Jonas

entry.title: Readiness Check Run for S/4HANA "FOUNDATION" System Upgrade to 2023
entry.content:
Hi All,

Need advise on SAP Readiness Check  run for upgrade to 2023 on-prem version of S/4HANA "FOUNDATION" only system. As per SAP Note# 3049197 it says that Readiness Check is only applicable for S/4HANA full stack systems but out-of-scope for S/4HANA Foundation systems.

So in that case-

Q1) Does it mean we do not need to do such a check at all for Foundation S4 systems w.r.t note 3049197 ?

Q2) Do we still need to do something "similar" to the readiness check for an Upgrade from a lower ABAP Foundation (say 1709 or 1809) to S/4HANA Foundation 2023 FPS01 version w.r.t note 3049197 ?

Q3) When SUM tool is run then for a S/4HANA Full stack system it will check for SI related items and blocks the Upgrade if those have not  resolved/decided prior to running of SUM, does it means similar is the case for S/4 Foundation systems as well when SUM is run ?

Q4) (Follow-on question to Q3), then instead of readiness check, do  we need still need to run SI checks outside of Readiness check for S4 Foundation upgrade, also do we need to check for  ATC Custom code  checks and are they mandatorily needed for S4 Foundation upgrade ?

 

Note# 3059197 - SAP Readiness Check for SAP S/4HANA upgrades

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

15. Can I use SAP Readiness Check for SAP S/4HANA upgrades to evaluate an SAP S/4HANA Foundation environment?

SAP Readiness Check for SAP S/4HANA upgrades is designed to support full stack SAP S/4HANA systems. The analysis of SAP S/4HANA Foundation systems used for deploying SAP HANA-only Add-Ons is out of scope.

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Regards,

Ashish

entry.title: In OPD transaction, I'm trying to find the email recipient table in SAP
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm inside the window when we open the transaction OPD and I'd like to find the tables that contains the email recipient list.

I see the table RES_T_DEC_TAB_EMAIL_RECEIVER_1 in OPD but I'm unable to find it in SAP S4

My goal is to schedule an extraction from this table.

Is there a way to find the tables inside S4 or its stored somewhere else ?

See screencaptures for more infos.

 ---Steps to Reproduce ---

  1. Open OPD transaction
  2. Select Sales Document and Determination Step: Email Recipient
  3. Try to find the table where this data is stored

Thanks!
